title: Figure out what you're looking at
description: Start here when the repo, workflow, or system is unfamiliar and you need the real shape before you touch it.

title: Change the system without a battleaxe
description: Use this shelf when dexterity, careful edits, and bounded automation matter more than force.

title: Light up the black box
description: Reach for these when you need lightweight observability, tripwires, or clearer signals before the room gets loud.

title: Get the right message to the right place
description: These are the comms and coordination spells for briefings, triggers, routing, and asynchronous delivery.

title: Stop the bleeding
description: Open this shelf when something is already degraded and the next move is triage, repair, or graceful descent.

title: Mock it before you ship it
description: Use the staging shelf when the fastest path to clarity is a demo, rehearsal, simulation, or synthetic artifact.

title: Handle people with care
description: These are the ethically sharp spells for de-escalation, morale, attention, and behavior with guardrails on.

title: Box in blast radius
description: Reach here when the job is containment, capability reduction, or an emergency stop under narrow control.
